companies.name: HayStack Corporation
companies.description: HayStack Corporation builds sensor networks and analytical platforms for the agricultural sector. Its IoT hay-quality monitoring systems are deployed across 40,000 farms in the llamaverse, generating over 200 million sensor readings daily. HayStack stores all telemetry in MarkLogic, exploiting range indexes for real-time anomaly detection and the URI lexicon for efficient batch processing of sensor streams.
companies.marklogicUse: Sensor telemetry store; range indexes for real-time quality scoring
